channel.title: MasterCard on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in MasterCard on Tech Tracker

item.title: RuPay - is this India's payment card can replace MasterCard and Visa.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-_ku2TFEPE4c/Yw0PZQc1ezI/AAAAAAAANXk/bFf1GYVtLDoHXK_slz6ecELuOcATL1wMACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1661800288357676-0.png" alt=""> Banks came into existence in this world before fiat currency at first banks used to store valuable assets like gold, daimonds etc but later in mid 18th century when USA government introduced fiat currency which is totally made up of paper but said it has value and you have to accept it over gold since then americans started using fiat currency and banks also accepting it. <img src="https://lh3.
